CustomMetadata.label: AA-007 - High proportion of without sharing classes

values.value: High proportion of without sharing classes
More than 25% of all Apex classes in this org declare without sharing. A codebase where a large proportion of classes bypass sharing indicates systemic over-privilege.
Even if each individual without sharing class has a valid justification, the combined risk surface is large. A single vulnerability in any of these classes potentially exposes all org data.
Audit all without sharing classes. Migrate to inherited sharing where the caller context is appropriate. Reserve without sharing for explicitly documented framework classes with no user input.
